customHome.heroTitle: Find custom vendors, start from gallery
customHome.heroLead: Upload a design or enter a description; AI will match vendors for you. Or browse the gallery, search by text, and use an image to redesign for better feasibility.
customHome.flow1Desc: Upload a design, enter a description, or search the gallery and pick an image.
customHome.flow2Desc: AI suggests categories and lists matching custom vendors (browse by category).
customHome.flow3Desc: Browse vendor work and contact info; send a message or go to their store.
customHome.workHint: One account for both client and vendor
customHome.ctaText: Need to outsource or find contractors?
remake.heroLead: Upload a photo of your existing item and choose a remake category (e.g. apparel remake, furniture refurbish, leather care). AI will generate a redesign and match you with makers.

aiEdit.instructionsErase2: Adjust brush size or click "Clear" to redraw
aiEdit.instructionsInpaint1: After uploading, paint the area to redraw (white = redraw area)
aiEdit.instructionsInpaint2: Fill in prompt for that area; negative_prompt is optional
aiEdit.instructionsOutpaint1: Upload image and set expand direction (left / right / up / down) in pixels
aiEdit.instructionsOutpaint2: Fill in prompt for the extended area (EN/ZH auto-translated)
aiEdit.instructionsRemoveBg2: Click "Remove background" to get transparent result (PNG recommended)
aiEdit.instructionsReplaceBg: Provide a subject image and at least "Background description" or upload "Background reference".

aiEdit.emptyStateSteps: Upload or select an image, then follow the tool steps and click Generate.
vendor.designWithBaseModels: Design with this vendor's base models
help.title: Help
help.subtitle: How to design products, find vendors, and for vendors: upload work and materials.
help.designerIntro: Product design: enter a description, choose category and reference images, generate a sketch; you can pick reference images from the vendor material library.
help.refSourceTitle: Where do reference images / base models come from?
help.refSourcePool: Digital base model library (by category): On the product design page, select a main category, then click "Select from vendor material library" to see all vendors' base models in that category; click an image to add it as a reference.
help.refSourceVendor: Individual vendor's base models: Go to a vendor's profile (e.g. from the homepage gallery or vendor list), click "Design with this vendor's base models"; on the product design page you'll see "Select from this vendor's base models" to import only that vendor's base models, then design.
help.vendorIntro: Vendor dashboard: upload portfolio, manage materials, view inquiries.
help.vendorNote: (Log in and set up vendor profile first)
help.faqPointsABefore: Product design: about 15 pts without reference images, 20 with. Scene simulation, pattern extraction, etc. as shown on each page. See
help.faqVendorAssets: No images when selecting from vendor material library?
help.faqVendorAssetsA: Select a main category first; materials load by that category. If no vendor has uploaded for that category, you'll see a message that there are no materials yet.
help.faqVendorUpload: How can vendors get their materials seen by designers?
help.faqVendorUploadA: After logging in, go to Vendor Dashboard → My base models (Base Models), upload images and set main category (required), title, etc. Designers can see your assets in "Select from vendor material library" by category on the product design page, or by clicking "Design with this vendor's base models" on your profile and then "Select from this vendor's base models".
help.moreLater: More modules and screenshot tutorials will be added. For issues, see FAQ or contact us.
contact.title: Contact us
contact.subtitle: For questions or collaboration, please email us.
